dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4644 IS: Drain the Slush Fund Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schiff (for himself, Mr. Kelly, and Ms. Slotkin) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To provide for limitations on judgments, awards, and compromise settlements under section 1304 of title 31, United States Code.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Drain the Slush Fund Act.

subsection.text: Section 1304 of title 31, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:
No judgment, award, compromise settlement, interest, or costs shall be authorized for payments that arise out of a lawsuit or claim filed by the President or Vice President.
This section, and the amendments made by this section, shall apply to any pending case or any cause of action arising on or after January 20, 2025.
